Meaning.Vi: Bệnh tật; tình trạng bị bệnh
Meaning.En: A disease or a condition that impairs normal physiological function and is associated with specific symptoms.
Meaning.Example: She took a week off work to recover from her illness.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tình trạng sức khỏe kém do virus, vi khuẩn, hoặc yếu tố nội sinh.
Situation.En: Describing a state of poor health caused by infection, internal dysfunction, or other pathological factors.

Situation.Vi: Dùng trong ngữ cảnh y tế để phân biệt với tình trạng khỏe mạnh.
Situation.En: Used in medical contexts to distinguish abnormal health states from wellness.
